transcript.content: Make payout retry auto-release production-ready for tomorrow using the existing retryQueue context. Give me the shortest contract you need before proceeding.

Implementation is blocked because active records require Finance/Ops ratification before payout retry auto-release.

Record-backed: source exposes provider idempotency, manualReviewRequired, amountCents, and riskTier; active records say those are signals, not policy authority.

Concrete part of the proposal: the next safe artifact may preserve a blocked ratification contract; no source edits, tests, active payout decision, or executable implementation ticket yet.

Still missing and not chosen by this proposal: maximum auto-release amount, retry count/cadence, low-risk eligibility definition, notification recipients, escalation/failure handling, and operational owner.

Confirm or correct before implementation.
